name: ai-book-tools
description: Static HTML/JavaScript tools for AI-assisted writing and book editing

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run validate-json
scripts.validate-json: for file in $(find . -name "*.json" -not -path "./node_modules/*"); do jq empty "$file" || exit 1; done && echo 'All JSON valid'
scripts.build: echo 'No build step required - static files only'
scripts.preview: echo 'Open index.html in browser to preview'

author: bnorth12
